# FSharp.Formatting

## Docs

- [Upgrading to fsdocs](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/upgrade.md)
- [F# Formatting: Documentation Tools for F# Code](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/index.md)
- [Getting Started](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/zero-to-hero.md)
- [Literate Notebooks](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/literate-notebook.md)
- [Command line](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/commandline.md)
- [Customization and Styling](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/styling.md)
- [Creating Content](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/content.md)
- [Code formatting](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/codeformat.md)
- [Markdown parser](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/markdown.md)
- [Users of FSharp.Formatting](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/users.md)
- [Generating API Docs](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/apidocs.md)
- [Embedding script output](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/evaluation.md)
- [Literate Scripts](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/literate.md)
- [Mermaid Diagrams](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/sidebyside/sidemermaid.md)
- [Literate Script](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/sidebyside/sidescript.md)
- [Markdown LaTeX](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/sidebyside/sideextensions.md)
- [Markdown Content](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/sidebyside/sidemarkdown.md)
- [Example: Styling for Right-Side Navigation Bar](https://fsprojects.github.io/FSharp.Formatting/templates/leftside/styling.md)
